title: evolvulus glomeratus f. strictus
intro: Evolvulus glomeratus f. strictus, commonly known as Dwarf Blue Daze, is a flowering plant species native to South America. It is a member of the borage family and is known for its vibrant blue flowers and small, oval-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems. Evolvulus glomeratus f. strictus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a natural remedy in traditional medicine.
